item.name: Create Product (Sell Item) - No Pickup Address

exec: console.log('✅ Product created with ID:', response.data.id);

body.raw:
{
  "action": "create",
  "title": "Test Product",
  "description": "A test product for API testing",

  "condition": "new",
  "size": "M",

  }
}
